arts.ttl: “Very serious, a bit of a jerk” – Nottingham Forest star moves to clear up teammate’s image, total opposite to appearance
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest star Murillo has insisted teammate Nikola Milenkovic is not like the person he appears to be thanks to his appearance. The defender has been speaking to GE Globo today about various Nottingham Forest subjects, including his defensive partner, Milenkovic. arts.ttl: “God willing” – Nottingham Forest star won’t rule out title challenge, complacency not an issue
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest star Murillo has admitted they’re not ruling out a title challenge this season as their season continues to go from strength to strength. GE Globo have an interview with the defender today in which he refuses to rule out a run for the title.
